published_prior_art.cite: HuberStrassen1973Minimax supplies general robust-testing minimax machinery, but not this Rosenbaum product-polytope vertex reduction.

Rosenbaum1987SensitivityPermutation gives statistic-selected sharp sensitivity tests; HuberStrassen1973Minimax gives the generic representative-pair template, neither the stated conditional causal alternative frontier.

repo_prior_art.cite: No other active qid studies a finite all-tests Rosenbaum conditional least-favorable-mixture frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: HuberStrassen1973Minimax is generic capacity theory; Rosenbaum1988SensitivityMultipleControls, GastwirthKriegerRosenbaum2000Separability, CohenOlsonFogarty2020AdversarialGame, and Fogarty2025Tilted retain selected-statistic classes rather than this finite all-tests mixture/support frontier.
Zhao2019SensitivityValue concerns asymptotic pair sensitivity values, not this all-tests least-favorable-law reduction.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: pair theorem and matched-set mixture question
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The claims condition on fixed Gamma, a uniform product alternative assignment baseline, and specified dominated independent alternative record laws.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any exact least-favorable-law statement applies only to this conditional Fisher-sharp-null testing game, not weak-null inference, ATE estimation, two-sided testing, or design-sensitivity asymptotics.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Make an n=1, m=3 instance the first substantive result: compute its least-favorable mixture, identify a nonempty support-switch region, and show explicitly where the classical tilt loses validity.

Add a theorem-level comparison that identifies the precise Rosenbaum-polytope property absent from HuberStrassen1973Minimax and explains why generic representative-pair theory does not settle the monotone-mixture support.
Give one concrete exponential-family matched-set alternative satisfying the likelihood ordering and separation assumptions, including the resulting Q values and Gamma range.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the conditional scope fixed; prioritize the worked m=3 least-favorable-mixture calculation as the novelty anchor.
